meaning: n.三倍数,三个一组adj.三倍的vt.三倍与vi.增至三倍
examples: Output should triple by next year.
Its population is about triple that of Venice.
The amount of alcohol in his blood was triple the legal maximum.
In other words, it is quite possible we will see that much talked-about "triple dip".
Worldwide, sales of digital set-top boxes are expected to nearly triple in four years, to 96 million.
